summary: Iteration 49 - Verified bug fixes for member classification and DUO deduplication. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI displays correct counts: Membres Actifs=97, Coachs Actifs=31, Partis=187. Alexandre Alsonso (exit_date=2026-10-15 future) correctly appears in Actifs tab, NOT in Partis tab. DUO members display correctly with PRIMARY/PARTENAIRE badges and visual grouping.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix verified: members.py line 59-61 correctly classifies departed as exit_date < today (not exit_date exists)
Backend fix verified: members.py line 86-87 skips DUO members in deduplication logic (is_duo check)
Frontend correctly filters members: line 253-254 uses same logic (exit_date < today for departed)
DUO grouping works: lines 269-334 properly groups PRIMARY+PARTNER members together visually
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified two bug fixes: 1) Members with future exit_date (exit_date >= today) are now correctly classified as active, not departed. Alexandre Alsonso (exit_date=2026-10-15) is now in Actifs tab. 2) DUO partners with same name as primary are NOT flagged as is_duplicate=true. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend tab counts: Actifs=97, Coachs=31, Partis=187. DUO pairs display correctly with PRIMARY/PARTENAIRE badges.

bug_1_departed_classification.description: Members with exit_date in the future were incorrectly classified as 'Partis'
bug_1_departed_classification.fix_logic: Changed from 'exit_date exists' to 'exit_date < today' for departed classification
bug_1_departed_classification.verification: Alexandre Alsonso (exit_date=2026-10-15) now appears in Actifs tab, not Partis

bug_2_duo_deduplication.description: DUO partners with same name as primary were incorrectly flagged as is_duplicate=true
bug_2_duo_deduplication.fix_logic: Skip DUO members (is_duo=true) in deduplication logic
bug_2_duo_deduplication.verification: All 24+ DUO members have is_duplicate=false, DUO pairs display correctly
